# Myoseon's Stories
> Korean short story and emotional essay archive by Myoseon.

## About
Myoseon's Stories is an online reading space for short stories, essays, and reflective writing. The site focuses on warm, emotional, healing text pieces presented in a quiet reading interface.

## Features
- Korean short stories and essays
- Emotional and healing writing
- Browser-based reading experience
- Theme and reading mood controls
- Connected to Myoseon's art and photo sites

## Links
- Stories: https://book.myoseon.kr/
- Main Myoseon site: https://myoseon.kr/
- Sitemap: https://book.myoseon.kr/sitemap.xml

## Language
- Korean (한국어)

## Category
Short Stories, Essays, Korean Writing, Healing Text, Online Reading
